prompt: Generate an image in the "Paper Reality: Mythical Haute Couture" style, 4:5 vertical. The scene is a high-end Oriental mythical haute couture design draft: off-white manuscript paper clipped to a wooden drawing board, placed on a warm wood-toned design workspace. The desk has fabric samples, color palettes, pencils, technical pens, a ceramic teacup, jade ornaments, metal accessories, and small-scale garment structure sketches.
